one_time_description: Settlement income from Implementation Agreement with Province of British Columbia (additional $12M in 2024; $55M received in prior year)
economic_notes: Nation has investments in Six Nations Ventures LP (16.67%), Blueberry River Enterprises LP (100%), 0851799 BC Ltd o/a Creever Trading Post (100%), Blueberry River Resources Ltd (100%), Bluevest Contractors Inc (50%), Blueberry Economic Development Inc (100%). Grandmother's Greenhouse LP and Dane-zaa Kaa'Gaa Tee Land Restoration LP are fully consolidated. Blueberry River Placeholder Trust manages $252.6M Treaty Land Entitlement settlement funds. Implementation Agreement with BC for land restoration and limits on industrial development.
notes: Audit is qualified due to absence of a budget as required by Canadian public sector accounting standards. Nation is in BC despite MNP Edmonton office. Large Placeholder Trust ($242.7M cash held in trust) relates to $252.6M Treaty Land Entitlement settlement with Government of Canada. Per capita distributions of $50,000 paid to members April 2023; minors' distributions held in trust ($12.9M liability). Settlement income from BC Implementation Agreement: $55M in FY2023, $12M in FY2024. Long-term debt includes ISC Treaty Land Entitlement debt of $364,765 (interest-free). Restricted cash of $67M relates to BC Interim Agreement for land healing/restoration. Blueberry River Enterprises LP has negative equity. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Consolidated entities include Grandmother's Greenhouse LP and Dane-zaa Kaa'Gaa Tee Land Restoration LP. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($3,266,363) + FNHA ($822,853) + CMHC ($360,000) + Other government ($218,746) = $4,667,962.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
